name: Blue Cheese, Hazelnut and Herb Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix radicchio leaves, blue cheese, yogurt, mayonnaise, Gelozone, toasted hazelnuts, hard-boiled egg pieces, and fresh herbs.
3. Shape the mixture into a terrine mold.
4. Place in the oven and bake for 30-40 minutes until set.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
